title: Duck Origin
description: Datapack add-on for Origins Mod. Become a Duck, conquer the sky and roam through waters of your world, as the best bird in existence.
body:
### If there is some sort of issue with the origin, you have additional questions or are interested in my other works, feel free to [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/Tu8UvDzqQG)



## Requires Pehkui for size change.

## Have you ever wondered, how it would feel like to be a duck? Say no more! I bring to you:
# Duck
Impact: 🟡🟡⚪️

_A duck. Conqueror of the skies, fast and furious in water, and able to walk on the ground. But everything has it's own price._

🟢**King of the Skies** - You were born with wings and know how to use them. You are able to traverse the skies without a problem, and you can use the power of your wings to accelerate in the direction you want. Just... watch out for obstacles.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have wings
  - You can't use rockets
  - Flying exhausts you
  - You can boost yourself during flight by using Space, but it will consume hunger
</details>

🟢**Waterfowl** - Your species loves to be around water, so you feel refreshed in biomes overflowing with it. You can also sharpen your eyesight while underwater to spot possible food faster.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have passive regeneration while in river, ocean or swamp biomes
  - You can toggle underwater vision while submerged in water
</details>

🟢**Waterproof Feathers** - Your fins and waterproof feathers not only allow you to move on the surface of the water, but also increase your speed underwater. Remember, however, that you still need air!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You can walk on water (shift to dive into water)
  - You have increased swim speed
  - While underwater you still need air
</details>

🟡**Uno Reverse** - Do you remember all these times when people were trying to hunt your kind? It's time to pay them back! You managed to master their own weapon, so now not only you can shoot arrows, but they are also more deadly! You also learned how to dodge their shots, at least to some extent. But any shot that will reach you will hurt you more than a standard person, and the same applies to constant attacks close-up.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Deal additional 3 damage with arrow projectiles
  - Take additional 1 damage from arrows and continuous melee attacks
  - "Dodge" Ability: Activate to get 3 dodge charges. Each charge nullifies damage from arrow projectiles that would hit you; lose 1 charge when hit by an arrow or all of them after 30 seconds from activation, 1.5 minutes cooldown.
</details>

🔴**Almost Perfect** - You are able to swim, fly, stay afloat. You are a perfect creature!... Almost. Your flippers prevent you from walking quickly on dry ground, and your feathers are very flammable. Watch out for lava and other fire sources.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Take double damage from fire damage sources
  - Walk slower while on land
</details>

🔴**Light-Hearted** - As a bird, you are small in stature, which also reflects on the amount of damage you can take. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have 7 hearts
  - You are 1 block tall, but you still can jump on a full block
</details>

🔴**Ever-hungry Omnivore** - You are able to eat basically everything except bread. In fact, you even like the taste of bread, but people gave you too much of it and you became picky. Besides, no matter what you eat, you get hungry fast anyway.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You can't eat bread
  - Exhaust faster
</details>
